hostPort.title: Host and Port
hostPort.description: InfluxDB 3 HTTP API URL (e.g. https://cluster.influxdata.com or http://localhost:8086).

databaseName.title: Database Name
databaseName.description: Optional name to give to the database in OpenMetadata. If left blank, we will use default as the database name.

databaseSchema.title: Database Schema
databaseSchema.description: Database Schema of the data source. This is optional parameter, if you would like to restrict the metadata reading to a single schema. When left blank, OpenMetadata Ingestion attempts to scan all the schemas.

schemaFilterPattern.title: Default Schema Filter Pattern
schemaFilterPattern.description: Regex to only fetch tables or databases that matches the pattern.

tableFilterPattern.title: Default Table Filter Pattern
tableFilterPattern.description: Regex exclude tables or databases that matches the pattern.

databaseFilterPattern.title: Default Database Filter Pattern
databaseFilterPattern.description: Regex to only fetch databases that matches the pattern.
